seoTitle: Manage Clients in ClickUp: CRM Setup Guide
metaDescription: Build a simple client management system in ClickUp with custom fields, onboarding automations, pipeline boards, and secure client-facing dashboards.
intro: You don't need separate CRM software to keep client work organized — ClickUp can handle it with the right structure. This guide walks through setting up a dedicated client Space, adding fields for contract value and account health, and automating onboarding tasks when a new client signs. It also covers safely sharing progress with clients through guest permissions.

steps.heading: Create a client management Space
steps.body: Set up a dedicated Space to hold all your client-related folders, separate from internal projects.

steps.heading: Add custom fields for account details
steps.body: Include fields for contract values, main stakeholders, and current account health flags.

steps.heading: Automate onboarding tasks
steps.body: Use Workspace Rules so a standard onboarding task list is generated automatically when a new client signs.

steps.heading: Build a pipeline board view
steps.body: Switch to a board layout grouped by account stage so you can see where each client stands at a glance.

steps.heading: Set up guest permissions
steps.body: Adjust sharing and permissions to safely invite clients to view only their relevant progress boards.

steps.heading: Summarize activity with ClickUp Brain
steps.body: Use ClickUp Brain to pull quick status summaries across active client folders when you need a recap.

faq.question: Can clients see my other clients' data in ClickUp?
faq.answer: No, granular permissions let you invite guests to only the specific boards or folders relevant to them.

faq.question: How do I automate client onboarding tasks?
faq.answer: Workspace Rules can trigger a standard onboarding checklist whenever a new client record is created.

faq.question: What custom fields work best for client tracking?
faq.answer: Fields like contract value, main stakeholder, and account health flags help you monitor relationships at a glance.

faq.question: Is ClickUp a full replacement for dedicated CRM software?
faq.answer: For many small teams it can cover the basics of client tracking, though dedicated CRMs may offer deeper sales-specific features.
